← All Use CasesUse Case

Managing Stress
& Anxiety

When you're overwhelmed at 2am and need someone to help you process. Ferni is always there—no judgment, no appointments, no waitlists.

The Challenge

Stress doesn't follow business hours. It hits when you're trying to fall asleep, during your commute, in the middle of a Sunday afternoon. And when it does, your support options are limited:

  • Therapy has waitlists and appointments
  • Friends have their own lives (and you don't want to be a burden)
  • Meditation apps can help, but sometimes you need to talk

You end up spiraling alone, replaying the same thoughts until exhaustion takes over.

How Ferni Helps

Ferni is available 24/7, ready to listen and help you process whatever's on your mind. No scheduling. No small talk. Just support when you need it.

Any Time, Any Place

3am can't-sleep sessions. Walking-the-dog conversations. Ferni is there when you need to talk.

Zero Judgment

Say whatever's on your mind. Ferni won't think less of you, won't gossip, won't get tired of listening.

Talk, Don't Type

Speaking activates different parts of your brain. You'll discover what you actually think by saying it out loud.

Remembers Your Context

Ferni knows your ongoing stressors. You don't have to explain the backstory every time.

"I called Ferni at 2am when I couldn't sleep because of work stress. Having someone to talk through my thoughts with—no judgment, just guidance—was exactly what I needed."

— Sarah K., Product Manager

A Typical Conversation

I can't stop thinking about this presentation tomorrow. I keep imagining everything that could go wrong.

That sounds exhausting—lying there while your mind runs through worst-case scenarios. Let's slow this down. What specifically feels most uncertain about tomorrow?

I guess I'm worried the executives will think I don't know what I'm talking about. There's this one VP who always asks really tough questions.

So it's less about the content itself and more about how you'll be perceived—especially by this VP. What's one tough question they've asked in the past that you handled well?

Ready to talk it through?

Ferni is here, right now. No sign-up required.

Start TalkingOr call 1 (484) 481-3081
Ferni

The AI that actually listens. Six specialists, one conversation, infinite memory.
